text: In this video, we will be describing the procedure for laparoscopic removal of a large para-ovarian cyst.

The surgeon makes an incision at the mesosalpinx region using a laparoscopic shearer, extending it to allow the removal of the large para-ovarian cyst intact. Gentle traction and counter traction are applied to detach the cyst from its attachment at the mesosalpines.
The surgeon applies gentle traction to deliver the entire para-ovarian cyst, which is now liberated intact from the mesosalpines.
The surgeon ruptures the para-ovarian cyst, aspirates the fluid, and removes the cyst wall from the peritoneal cavity.
